title: Multi-Brand Gift Card Comparison
description: What are the differences between Illinocad and Galeries Lafayette multi‑brand gift cards regarding validity, usage conditions, and redemption limits?
narrative: The user wants to compare two specific multi‑brand gift card options to decide which one best fits their needs. Relevant information will include validity periods, whether the cards can be used multiple times, store and online coverage, any restrictions on certain products or services, accumulation limits, non‑transferability, and any benefits or loyalty program connections. Documents addressing these criteria will be considered relevant; unrelated gift card descriptions, unrelated regional offers, or generic brand discussions will not meet the relevance criteria.

title: Quick Mild Lamb Tagine
description: I want a lamb tagine recipe that cooks in under 45 minutes, uses a tagine pot, and has a mild spice profile.
narrative: The user seeks a convenient, flavorful lamb tagine but prefers a light, not overly spicy dish. The ideal recipe should be prepared in a tagine or similar pot, take less than 45 minutes total cooking time, and rely on basic seasonings such as salt, pepper, and fresh herbs instead of strong spice blends like ras‑el‑hanout or large amounts of chili. The dish should focus on the lamb and vegetables, avoid excessive potatoes or rice, and keep the flavor profile moderate for a quick weekday meal.

title: Used‑Car Budget Shopping
description: What used‑car options are available within a specific price, mileage, and regional limit in France?
narrative: The user seeks listings of French used cars that meet a defined budget ceiling, a maximum mileage threshold, and a chosen geographic region. Relevant documents must display filter options or highlights for price, mileage, and location, as well as guidance on selecting the best deal. Documents that lack these criteria or focus on unrelated vehicle types are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes Variations
description: What are the best veal paupiettes recipes that use seasonal vegetables and can be prepared within 45 minutes?
narrative: The user is looking for concise, easy‑to‑follow veal paupiettes recipes that feature seasonal produce, include sauce or accompaniment details, and have a total cooking time of 45 minutes or less. Documents should provide clear ingredient lists, step‑by‑step instructions, and specify the cooking duration while highlighting flavor pairings such as mushrooms, carrots, or tomatoes.

title: Child Sun Visor Selection
description: What factors should I consider when selecting and installing a sun visor to protect my baby from UV rays and heat in a car?
narrative: I need detailed guidance on the different types of car sun visors (roll‑up, suction‑cup, electrostatic), their installation methods, UV‑blocking effectiveness, heat‑reduction performance, and child‑safety features. Relevance criteria include information that helps compare product specifications, installation ease, durability, and suitability for infants or toddlers during vehicle travel.

title: Petit Bateau Loyalty & Live Shopping
description: How can I join the Petit Bateau loyalty program and earn points during their live shopping events?
narrative: The user wants to understand the eligibility criteria, enrollment steps, point accumulation rates during live shopping, redemption options, and any restrictions. Documents that are relevant must provide clear details about the loyalty program mechanics and how it integrates with the 30‑minute live shopping experience.

title: Renault Employee Cars
description: What are the benefits, discounts, and conditions for purchasing a Renault employee car through Elite Auto?
narrative: The user wants to understand the specific advantages of buying a car sold by Renault staff (employee car) via Elite Auto, including discount percentages, loan terms, insurance options, and how these compare to a standard new or certified pre‑owned purchase. Relevant answers should include details about price reductions, lease or purchase options, insurance coverage, warranty, and any eligibility criteria.

title: War School Book Access
description: How can an international academic library obtain print and e‑books from the War School, and what are the associated costs, delivery times, and copyright restrictions?
narrative: The user is an academic librarian looking for detailed guidance on the ordering process, available file formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), print‑on‑demand shipping logistics, payment options (credit card, bank transfer), shipping costs (0.01 € within metropolitan France, post office/Chronopost otherwise), delivery time frames, and the intellectual‑property policy governing reuse of War School materials. Relevance requires explicit reference to these elements.

title: Reloaded Unemployment Eligibility
description: I need to know whether I qualify for reloadable unemployment benefits after recently working part‑time, and how the new French rules apply.
narrative: The user, a private‑sector employee who returned to work after a period of unemployment, wants to determine if they are eligible for reloadable rights under the post‑2019 French ARE framework. They seek specific information on minimum work hours (e.g., 910 hours or 130 days), the impact of voluntary resignation versus involuntary loss, the time limits for exhausting initial rights, how to apply for the option to reload, and what documentation Pôle Emploi requires to calculate and award the updated allowance.

title: AXA Client Login Issues
description: What steps can I take to recover a forgotten password or troubleshoot login problems for my AXA customer space, including secure authentication and alternative contact options?
narrative: The user is an AXA policyholder who has lost access to their online client area. They need detailed guidance on the 'Forgotten password' process, how to confirm that the login page is secure (HTTPS and official host), where to find the actual login URL, and what alternative support channels (phone, email, chat) are available if the password reset fails. Relevance criteria: documents that provide step‑by‑step instructions for password recovery, verification of official URLs, and contact details for AXA support. Documents that merely mention AXA services without login troubleshooting, or that refer to other insurers’ customer spaces, are not considered relevant.

title: Battery Lifespan & Subsidies
description: What strategies can I use to extend the battery life of my electric car, and what subsidies or financial aids are available to help offset costs?
narrative: The user seeks practical techniques for prolonging battery health (e.g., optimal charge range, charging frequency, avoidance of deep discharge, fast‑charge etiquette) as well as up‑to‑date information on French financial incentives for new or converted electric vehicles (green bonus, conversion premium, regional aids, etc.) The documents should provide actionable maintenance advice and clear eligibility criteria for each subsidy.

title: Potato Disease Management
description: What are effective prevention and treatment strategies for common potato diseases and pests like late blight, common scab, and Colorado potato beetle?
narrative: The user is a potato grower seeking practical, evidence-based methods to control disease and pest threats. Relevant documents should provide details on symptoms, prevention, and treatment of late blight, common scab, downy mildew, wireworms, and Colorado potato beetle, including chemical, biological, or cultural practices, and recommended resistant varieties. Content that merely discusses general grass‑roots cleanup, historical anecdotes, or unrelated gardening tips should be considered non‑relevant.

title: Three-Day Darkness Prophecy
description: Where can I find detailed, credible information on the alleged global blackout that will last three days, including its predicted timing, underlying causes, and associated phenomena such as a pole shift or Nibiru passage?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive understanding of the "Three Days of Darkness" prophecy—its origins, dates, scientific plausibility, and sources—while filtering out unrelated or sensationalist material.

title: Where to Stream La Folle
description: Which legal streaming services provide the 1987 film La Folle History of Space (French: La Folle Histoire de l’Espace) and how can I obtain it?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date, legitimate options for watching or downloading the 1987 sci‑fi comedy La Folle, including provider names, availability, and language/subtitle information. Relevant documents must mention the film’s title, year, and a clear legal access point.

title: Espionage Realism
description: What production techniques does Le Bureau des Légendes use to portray realistic DGSE operations?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about how the series achieves authenticity in depicting French intelligence activities, looking for behind‑the‑scenes accounts, production notes, and discussions of real DGSE procedures. Relevance is based on documents that discuss realistic operational portrayals, realistic set designs, and accurate portrayal of protocols, rather than plot summaries or unrelated entertainment activities such as escape games.

title: Allege and Prevail conjugation
description: What are the correct conjugations of the French verbs for 'to allege' and 'to prevail' across various tenses?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide to conjugate the French verbs 'allegé' (to allege) and 'prevail', with accurate forms in present, past, future, conditional, subjunctive, and other relevant moods. Relevant documents should include full conjugation tables, example sentences, and explanations of irregularities; content unrelated to verb conjugation (e.g., travel information, unrelated verbs) should be excluded.

title: Rendez‑vous Episodes
description: What are the episode details (celebrity, remote location, air date) for all seasons of Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive list of all episodes, including the celebrity host, the specific remote location visited, the original French TV air date, and a brief synopsis. Relevance requires accurate episode information of the French series; unrelated biographies, interviews, or unrelated news about the show’s personnel are not pertinent.

title: Diarrhea Diet
description: What foods and drinks should I eat when I have diarrhea?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed dietary advice for managing diarrhea symptoms. Relevant documents should contain recommendations on suitable foods (e.g., cooked vegetables, soft‑fiber fruits, lean meats) and beverages (e.g., water, electrolyte solutions, digestive teas) to consume, as well as items to avoid (e.g., raw or high‑fiber foods, dairy, sugary drinks). Non‑dietary cooking tips or general recipes unrelated to diarrhea treatment are not relevant.

title: Paris large venue
description: Find a large event venue in Paris that is about 3,000 m², has hosted around 300 events, and can accommodate roughly 200,000 visitors.
narrative: The user is planning a major event or festival and needs information on a commercial space that meets a specific size requirement, has a proven track record of hosting numerous events, and has demonstrated capacity for a high number of visitors. Relevant documents should detail the venue’s square footage, event history, visitor statistics, and rental availability; non‑relevant content such as sauna facilities or city‑wide historical descriptions should be ignored.

title: Dynamic Green Tariffs
description: How can I find an electricity supplier that offers real‑time market price tariffs with 100% renewable sourcing while ensuring transparency and cost savings?
narrative: The user is a residential consumer who wants to reduce electricity costs by selecting a supplier that charges the market price for kWh without a margin, provides real‑time billing and consumption controls, and guarantees that the power comes from renewable sources. Relevance criteria include documentation that explains dynamic pricing mechanisms, subscription terms, app-based consumption monitoring, and green energy commitments.

title: Kia Bordeaux EV Options
description: What electric or hybrid Kia models are available for purchase or lease in Bordeaux, and what are their pricing, availability, and after‑sales support?
narrative: The user is researching electric and hybrid Kia vehicles at the Edenauto KIA Bordeaux dealership. They need up‑to‑date information on model availability (e.g., Niro EV, K3, K5), MSRP or lease rates, any available incentives or discounts, and details on after‑sales service hours and support. Relevance criteria: documents that mention specific Kia EV or hybrid models, their pricing or build‑and‑price data, dealer operating hours, service offerings, and contact or alert options are considered relevant; generic dealer pages, unrelated geographic locations, or non‑sale‑related content are not.

title: French Ancestry Origins
description: What is the historical basis for the claim that France’s ancestors were predominantly Gauls, and how does this claim hold against evidence of diverse migrations and cultural influences that have shaped French identity?
narrative: The user is investigating the popular notion that French ancestry is rooted mainly in ancient Gaulic tribes and wants to weigh that claim against scholarly and archaeological evidence of multiple waves of migration (e.g., Franks, Vikings, North African and Sub‑Saharan immigrants) and the evolving self‑definition of France from the Middle Ages to the modern republic. Relevant documents should discuss the historical definitions of Gaul (Caesar, Roman and later medieval sources), the transition from Gaul to France, the construction of national myths in education and politics, and the documentation of later migrations. Documents that simply portray Gauls in fictional or comedic contexts (such as the Asterix comic series) or that lack historical source material are considered irrelevant. The user expects notes on historiography, sociopolitical context, and the interplay between myth and material evidence.

title: Faro 7‑Day Car Rental Cost
description: What is the total cost, including taxes, fees, insurance and any extra charges, for renting a car in Faro for 7 days, and how do the costs compare across different agencies and pick‑up/drop‑off locations?
narrative: The user intends to book a car for a 7‑day stay in Faro and wants a fully transparent cost comparison. Relevance criteria include documents that provide (i) a detailed price breakdown – base rate, taxes, fees, insurance – for at least a 7‑day period, (ii) information on drop‑off locations (air‑port vs city), (iii) potential hidden costs such as toll devices or extra insurance, and (iv) comparative data across multiple agencies. Only documents that offer this comprehensive cost view are considered relevant.

title: Nantes Station Car Rental
description: I want to know which car rental agencies at Nantes South Station offer vehicles, pricing, and one‑way drop‑off options.
narrative: The user is traveling via train to Nantes and needs a quick and affordable rental from the South Station. Relevance requires information about agency location, operating hours, vehicle categories, prices, age restrictions, booking options, one‑way drop‑off availability, and any special promotions or membership discounts.

title: Disease‑Resistant Potatoes
description: What are the optimal methods for growing disease‑resistant potatoes suitable for a home garden?
narrative: The user is a backyard gardener who wants to minimise crop losses from fungal and bacterial diseases and insect pests. They need guidance on selecting varieties with built‑in resistance (e.g., Samba, Charlotte), applying cultural controls such as a ≥4‑year crop rotation, companion planting (aubergines to trap Colorado beetle), proper soil preparation, irrigation management, and disease‑specific treatments (Bordeaux mixture for downy mildew, loach decoction spray). Relevance requires coverage of variety choice, rotation timing, disease identification and treatment, pest monitoring, and soil amendments.

title: Beaujolais AOC Distinctions
description: What are the geographic, grape, and stylistic differences among the twelve Beaujolais AOCs and the ten named crus?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed comparison of the Beaujolais appellations, including terroir, grape varieties (primarily Gamay), production regulations, and typical wine styles for each AOC and crus. Relevance criteria: only documents that describe the geographic boundaries, the nine or ten crus (Morgon, Régnié, Moulin‑à‑Vent, Côte de Brouilly, Brouilly, Juliénas, Saint‑Amour, Chénas, Chiroubles, Fleurie) and the basic AOCs (Beaujolais, Beaujolais Villages) are considered pertinent. Information outside these appellations or unrelated marketing content is excluded.

title: Winter Rugged Boots
description: What are the best men’s boots for cold weather that combine durability, comfort, and style?
narrative: The user seeks high‑quality, winter‑ready men’s boots that can endure harsh conditions while remaining comfortable for everyday wear. Relevance should be judged by brand reputation for rugged construction (e.g., Timberland, André), waterproof or insulated features, supportive soles, and contemporary styles such as 6‑inch or 8‑inch boots. Documents that discuss material durability, brand heritage, user reviews on winter performance, or specific weather‑proof design elements qualify; generic footwear, casual shoes, or non‑winter items are considered irrelevant.

title: Renault Electric Lease Options
description: What Renault electric cars can I lease, and what are their price, battery capacity, lease duration, and incentives?
narrative: The user wants detailed leasing information on Renault electric vehicles to aid in a purchase decision. Relevant information includes specific models (e.g., Twingo E‑Tech, Zoe, Captur), monthly rent, initial payment, total lease cost, battery capacity, range, lease term, and any ecological bonus or conversion premium. Documents must provide these details; generic finance terms, stock data, or unrelated vehicle information should be considered irrelevant.

title: International Car Rental Comparison
description: What is the best way to compare short‑term car rental prices across European airports while ensuring all fees and insurance options are clearly shown?
narrative: The user is looking for a guide to find the lowest cost and most transparent car‑rental deals in Europe. They want to use comparison sites that provide inclusive pricing, explain insurance and fuel policies, and disclose all extras. Relevance criteria include clear comparisons of rates, summaries of hidden costs, and practical tips for booking without surprise fees. Out‑of‑scope material includes generic travel listings, single‑destination offers, or non‑price‑comparator rental sites.

title: Reunion Car Rental
description: What are the cheapest car rental options available on Reunion Island, including pickup and return times, insurance coverage, and any discount codes?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Reunion Island and seeks the most cost‑efficient vehicle rental—ideally with flexible pickup/return hours, all‑risk insurance, unlimited mileage, and promotional discounts—while excluding non‑Reunion or unrelated services. Relevance should be judged by presence of detailed pricing, booking conditions, and insurance info specific to Reunion rental agencies.

title: Car Value Estimation
description: How can I accurately estimate the current market value of my 2015 Toyota Corolla in Switzerland?
narrative: The user wants a precise appraisal of a specific vehicle for resale purposes, relying on up‑to‑date Swiss listings and valuation tools (e.g., AutoScout24’s free estimate service). Relevant documents should provide detailed pricing data, valuation methods, and regional market insights for 2015 Toyota Corolla listings in Switzerland, while generic or non‑Swiss vehicle listings and unrelated content will be considered irrelevant.

title: Road Accidents: Film vs Reality
description: What similarities and differences exist between the portrayal of road‑accident consequences in Mad Max and the actual legal compensation processes for traffic‑injury victims?
narrative: The user is interested in a comparative analysis that highlights how a dystopian film dramatizes the aftermath of vehicular incidents—emphasizing violence, retribution, and societal breakdown—while real‑world legal frameworks focus on injury assessment, compensation calculations, and court jurisdiction. Relevance is determined by documents that discuss Mad Max’s narrative (e.g., character reactions to road violence) and detailed descriptions of road‑accident compensation schemes, legal terminology, and jurisdictional rules. Documents lacking clear treatment of either a filmic portrayal of traffic incidents or the procedural/financial aspects of actual compensation are not considered relevant.

title: Arkéa Arena Events
description: What concerts and events are scheduled at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux, and what accessibility and parking options are available for attendees?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, up‑to‑date information about upcoming performances at the Arkéa Arena, including performer names, dates, ticket availability, and contact lines for reservations. They also want clarity on accommodations for people with reduced mobility, parking arrangements (such as the Parcub system), and any relevant accessibility services. Relevant documents should include Arkéa Arena's event listings, contact information for accessibility coordination, and parking policies.

title: Women Farmers Letters 1969-1976
description: Where can I find primary source letters from rural women farmers to Menie Grégoire during 1969-1976 in Indre‑et‑Loire archives?
narrative: The user is researching the lived experiences of rural women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire, specifically the collection of letters preserved in the Menie Grégoire fonds (66J) at the Departmental Archives of Indre‑et‑Loire. They need documents that provide original correspondence, accession references, and contextual notes—preferably digitized copies or links to the archive’s web pages. Relevance requires primary source letters (or credible secondary references to them such as Wikipedia workshop materials), archival metadata, and direct connection to the Menie Grégoire collection, while excluding weather reports, health insurance documents, or unrelated administrative notices.

title: Energy Dispute Process
description: How can a French consumer file a complaint with the National Energy Ombudsman and what steps are involved in resolving disputes with energy suppliers?
narrative: The user seeks a step‑by‑step guide covering eligibility, contact methods, deadlines, required documentation and the Ombudsman’s role in mediating disputes. Relevant documents describe the complaint workflow, timelines, and responsibilities of parties; irrelevant content consists of general market statistics or unrelated services.

title: Office PC Selection
description: What factors should I evaluate when purchasing an office desktop computer for a small business in 2024?
narrative: The user wants to compare performance, upgradeability, pricing, bundled Microsoft 365 deals, and shipping options across Windows and Mac desktop options—focusing on long‑term support and cost efficiency while considering retailer promotions such as those offered by Darty.

title: Silver Photography Equip Guide
description: What silver film cameras, lenses, and development labs are best for producing high‑quality black and white images?
narrative: The user seeks practical recommendations for outfitting a silver‑photography workflow, prioritising camera bodies and lenses that handle low‑light and high‑contrast situations, film types suitable for black and white imaging, and reputable lab services offering chemical development and high‑resolution scanning. Relevance is judged by direct discussion of silver (black‑and‑white) photographic gear, specific film or paper choices, camera models/lenses, and lab or software solutions tailored to silver imaging, as opposed to generic photo or digital topics.

title: Low‑fat Leek Quiche
description: How can I prepare a leek quiche that is low in fat while still tasting flavorful?
narrative: The user wants a version of the classic leek quiche that limits total fat and, if possible, uses lean protein or plant‑based substitutes instead of traditional lardons. Relevance criteria include explicit mention of reduced or alternative fat sources (e.g., low‑fat cream, non‑fat cheese, Greek yogurt, or plant‑based proteins), adapted portion sizes, and cooking steps that preserve the dish’s savory profile without excessive salt or fat. Content that addresses sugar or carbohydrate content may also be considered relevant, but the core focus is on fat reduction and flavor maintenance.

title: Paper‑Only Kids Games
description: Find quiet, hardware‑free games for children that can be played at home with minimal materials, such as paper, pencil, or simple household items.
narrative: The user seeks age‑appropriate, low‑disturbance activities that require little or no equipment. Relevant documents should list games playable with paper, pencils, or reusable cards, offer printable resources, and be suitable for children ages 3‑12.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What conditions qualify a job seeker for the mobility assistance program that covers travel, meals, and accommodation for interviews in France?
narrative: The user is a job seeker close to a regional border asking for a detailed explanation of the eligibility criteria for Pôle Emploi’s mobility assistance. They need to know the distance or travel‑time thresholds (e.g., more than 60 km or over two hours round‑trip), the types of contracts that trigger aid (CDI, CDD, or CTT lasting at least three consecutive months), the required income or benefit status (e.g., unemployed, on minimum wage or social benefits), the annual ceiling of €5,000, and any additional allowances such as SAM network host‑family accommodation. The narrative should therefore include all terms that define which job seekers can apply, how to apply, and what the program actually covers.

title: SFR Client Access
description: How can a mobile or fixed-line customer access, recover login credentials, and manage billing in the SFR Client Area?
narrative: The user is looking for step‑by‑step guidance on connecting to the SFR Client Area, including how to log in, reset or retrieve a forgotten password, link an email address to their account, and view or download invoices. Relevant documentation will contain instructions for authentication, password recovery processes, email‑linking procedures, invoice access, and related support contacts or links. Non‑relevant content such as information about the RED brand, social‑media support, or unrelated customer service details is not useful.

title: Oil Lamp Parts Selection
description: Looking for information on choosing and replacing oil lamp glass, spouts, and wicks for outdoor use.
narrative: The user needs detailed guidance on selecting suitable oil lamp components such as glass types, spouts, and wicks for both domestic and camping applications, focusing on quality, compatibility, and cost-effectiveness. Relevant documents should discuss product options, brands, material choices, and practical tips for maintenance and replacement.

title: Cost‑Effective Madeira Rental
description: I want to find the most affordable and reliable car rental options for a week stay in Madeira, including insurance, fuel and pickup/drop‑off convenience.
narrative: The user is planning a week‑long trip to Madeira and needs to compare major rental agencies (Europcar, Avis, Sixt, local providers) for price ranges (≈€100–150 per week), insurance/de‑diction costs (≈€200), fuel estimates and location of pick‑up/drop‑off (airport vs. Funchal). They also care about suitable car categories (engine power for steep roads, category A vs. B), the possibility of returning early if staying in Funchal, and language support (French/English). Relevance requires up‑to‑date cost data, clear insurance explanations, fleet suitability for island driving and practical pickup/drop‑off guidance."}

title: Sprouted Potato Safety
description: Can sprouted potatoes be safely consumed after removing sprouts and green parts, and what is the risk level of solanine?
narrative: The user wants to know whether sprouted potatoes pose a health risk, how much solanine is required to be harmful, how to reduce toxicity through proper preparation and storage, and what safe cooking or handling practices are recommended. Relevant documents should cover solanine toxicity, safe consumption limits, methods for removing hazardous parts, and storage guidelines.

title: APRE Eligibility Guide
description: What are the eligibility criteria, application steps, and cost coverage limits for APRE assistance?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of the personalized back‑to‑work assistance (APRE), including who qualifies (RSA recipients actively seeking work with income below thresholds), what expenses are covered (mobility, training, accommodation, clothing, child care), how to apply (through RSA referee, form, required documents, timing), and departmental variations in funding and maximum amount (up to €3,000 per year). They also want clarity on whether APRE can be combined with other benefits and how to prove eligibility. Relevance: documents that detail APRE policies, guidelines, application procedures, eligibility thresholds, cost categories, and examples from specific departments.
